title: avenella flexuosa
intro: Avenella flexuosa, also known as the flexible osier or bent osier, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pinaceae, native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Avenella flexuosa is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk remedies and natural health practices.
